The '''''Sunrunner''''' was a fast, but unarmed, sea cutter provided for [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] by [[Loreli Ro]]. It was equipped with a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Navigation computer/Legends|navicomputer]], [[Mitgard]] [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] engines, and clean-burning [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drives]]. The ship was used by [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] to seek [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Mere Resistance|forces]] lead by [[Sol Sixxa]]. Nym rammed it into the [[Revenant (Mere)|''Revenant'']], sinking both vessels and destroying many [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s.

==Description==
The ''Sunrunner'' was a grey aquatic vessil with an pattern of some kind. Equipped with [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Navigation computer/Legends|navicomputer]], [[Mitgard]] [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] engines, and clean-burning [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drives]].<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 2" />

Inside the vessel had a couple of hatches and a medical room which had a bed some surgical equipment.<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 2" />

==History==
===Afternoon===
The ''Sunrunner'' was bought by [[Loreli Ro]] for Nym to locate Sol Sixxa so that he would end his piracy on innocent [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]]. Nym was distraught on the fact the ship had no weapons, which Loreli explained that the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] placed restrictions on arming their vessels. Nym ordered [[Jannik (Rodian)|Jannik]] and his [[Reeven Clan]] to bring every weapon they could carry and his [[Havoc (starfighter)|Havoc's]] [[Bomblet generator/Legends|Bomblet generator]] to the ship, while [[Jinkins]] would helm the ship and Loreli would handle navigation.<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 2" />

Afterwards, the ''Sunrunner'' was sent to the location of the ''[[Syren]]'', a Trade Federation pleasure liner that was sunk by Sol Sixxa. Nym would retrieve the head of [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Toat]]{{'s}} [[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol droid]], [[PL-37]] when he was attacked by a [[Relix]]. Nym then tied his noose to a piece of debris and threw it into the Relix{{'s}} maw, losing his cybernetic arm in the process and ordered Jinkins to go full throttle, forcing the Relix to surface and be blasted by the Reeven Clan.<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 2" />

Nym returned to the ship with the head of PL-37 and got Jinkins to tap into the Droid{{'s}} brain to learn that Sixxa had a prototype before it burnt out. This caused the ''Sunruner'' to be tracked by Trade Federation forces lead by [[Harro Ruuk]].<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 2" /> Meanwhile [[Kole]] would find the [[Refugee captain]] in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] [[Silver Cloud]] and was got him to join Nym before he would confront Sol Sixxa.

===First and last battle===
The ''Sunrunner'' was brought the [[Haunted Straits]] where Sixxa had set up base for his raids on his ship the '''[[Revenant (Mere)|Revenant]]'''. During the preparation the Bomblet Generator had been retrofitted as a [[Turret/Legends|turret]] and Jinkins had fitted Nym with a [[Hand cannon]]. Halfway through the Straits Sixxa attacked the vessel but Nym{{'s}} Rodian warriors and Bomblet Generator turret decimating his speeders forced Sixxa to retreat onto his ship which had a prototype [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]]. When Nym jumped onboard the ''Revenant'', with Kole, Loreli and the Rodians right behind, he tackled Sixxa overboard. Kole managed to disable the prototype cloaking device giving Jinkins a visual and radar reading, but before he could engage Trade Federation [[Ostracoda-class gunboat]]s arrived with [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s and captured both ships.<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 3" />

Sol Sixxa would then return attacking the Trade Federation droids, while Nym would get back on his ship and tell Jinkins to overload the Bomblet Generator and get Jannik to a life-pod. He then set the ship full speed to the ''Revenant'' and collided it while Kole, Loreli and the Rodians jumped overboard. The ''Sunrunner'' smashed through the ''Revenant'' and exploded taking many Battle Droids and the gunboats with it. Both ships would sink to the bottom.<ref name="Starfighter: Crossbones 3">[[Starfighter: Crossbones 3|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 3]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
''Sunrunner'' was also the name of a server - or "Galaxy" - in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. It appears in issues 2 and three of the comic series ''Starfighter: Crossbones''.

==Appearances==
*[[Starfighter: Crossbones 2|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 2]] {{1st}}
